regional_alignment: Hampden County Mesh is locally focused while aligning with the existing BDL / Windsor Locks regional mapping area where appropriate.

local_broker.notes: Local MQTT broker infrastructure is installed and being prepared for future observer, bridge, and analytics work.

systems.name: Website
systems.notes: GitHub Pages website is online and serving project pages, documentation, image assets, and map foundations.

systems.name: MeshCore-Hub
systems.notes: Linux-based hub supports logging, local services, documentation, MQTT testing, and future automation.

systems.name: Hampden Room Observer
systems.notes: Heltec V3 observer used for MeshCore monitoring, logging, MQTT testing, and future public status reporting.

systems.name: Local MQTT Services
systems.notes: Local MQTT infrastructure is installed and being tested. Public live integration is not yet active.

systems.name: Public Live Data
systems.notes: Public website data is manually maintained until automated observer, MQTT, and logging integrations are ready.

systems.name: County Network
systems.notes: Additional nodes, observers, repeaters, coverage tests, and community-hosted infrastructure are still being developed.

active_projects: Local MQTT and future bridge planning
notes: Hampden County Mesh has operational core infrastructure, but the wider county network, public live data, automated reporting, and broader coverage are still being built.
public_notice: Status information is manually maintained for now. Public live statistics are planned but not yet automated.
